name: Ham and Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (20 oz.) can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a saucepan.
2. Gradually blend in flour.
3. Remove from heat and stir constantly until smooth.
4. Return to low heat and gradually add milk, stirring constantly.
5. Add mustard, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Pour the mixture into a nonstick casserole dish.
7. Top with breadcrumbs and grated American cheese.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes or until bubbly.
